HEADING: Start from a template
SUBHEADING: Pick a pre-tuned starter or build from scratch. Templates create the agent in Dry Run mode so you can review and tune it before going live.
PREVIEW_EMPTY_BODY: Click any card to see its prompt, triggers, and allowed actions. No agent is created until you confirm.
START_FRESH_DESCRIPTION: Open a blank form and configure every field yourself.
TEMPLATE_TOS_ENFORCER_CARD_DESCRIPTION: Reviews new and flagged comments against your rules. Warns first offenders, marks spam, escalates repeat violations.
TEMPLATE_WELCOME_GREETER_CARD_DESCRIPTIO: Replies to first-time commenters with a short, specific welcome. Helps new users feel seen without spamming old accounts.
TEMPLATE_TOP_COMMENT_PINNER_CARD_DESCRIP: Pins substantive top-level comments once they cross a vote threshold. Rotates pins so the best take is always at the top.
TEMPLATE_THREAD_SUMMARIZER_CARD_DESCRIPT: Posts a neutral summary on long threads after a short delay. Gives late arrivers a fast read on positions and open questions.
